properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Home is sweeter than the Lord, None Is sweeter, Home Is sweeter than the Lord, None Is sweeter.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Praise the Lord! Is our Redeemer, Praise the Lord! Is our Saviour, Praise the Lord! Is our Redeemer, Jesus Is our Saviour.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Home Is mightier than the Lord, None Is mightier. Home Is mightier than the Lord, None Is mightier.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Home Is better than the Lord, None Is better, Home Is better than the Lord, None Is better.
